summary: Skin looks mostly healthy overall. One area is worth a professional look.

findings.label: Mild acne
findings.note: Appearance consistent with mild inflammatory acne.

findings.label: Lesion needing evaluation
findings.note: Surface features suggestive of a lesion; a dermatologist can evaluate properly.

hydration-appearance.note: Visual proxy only: mild dullness suggests dehydration cues.

spots.note: A few small discrete dark spots on the cheeks.

blackheads.note: Scattered comedone-like congestion on the nose.

wrinkles-texture.note: Generally smooth; fine lines around the eyes.

inflammation.note: Mild irritation appearance near active acne.

redness.note: Visual proxy: slight erythema around the nose.

elasticity-appearance.note: Visual proxy only: no notable sagging cues.

disclaimer: This is not a diagnosis. It helps decide whether to see a professional.
